doc.prompt: Write a long email template that invites a group of participants to a meeting, with at least 500 words. The email must include the keywords "correlated" and "experiencing" and should not use any commas.

resps:
The email should be in a professional tone and should be structured with a subject line a greeting a body and a closing. The body should be broken into paragraphs with clear topic sentences and transitions. The email should also include a call to action and a deadline for RSVP. The email should be written in English and should not use any markdown formatting.
Subject Line  
Invitation to Strategic Planning Meeting  

Dear Team  

We are pleased to extend an invitation to you for an upcoming strategic planning meeting that will take place on Thursday the 28th of September at 10:00 AM in the main conference room. This meeting is a crucial step in aligning our departmental goals with the overall vision of the organization. Your participation is essential as we work together to ensure that all initiatives are correlated with the long-term objectives of the company.  

The purpose of this meeting is to review the progress made in the past quarter and to outline the strategies that will guide us in the coming months. We will be discussing key performance indicators and how they are correlated with our current projects. This is an opportunity to share insights and to address any challenges that the team is experiencing. Your input will be invaluable in shaping the direction of our future plans.  

We understand that your time is valuable and we appreciate your commitment to this important discussion. The meeting will begin promptly at 10:00 AM and is expected to last approximately two hours. We encourage you to arrive a few minutes early to ensure that we can start on time and make the most of our time together.  

To confirm your attendance please RSVP by Friday the 22nd of September. This will help us prepare the necessary materials and make any logistical arrangements. If you have any questions or need further information please do not hesitate to contact me directly. Your prompt response will allow us to finalize the agenda and ensure that all topics of interest are covered.  

We are experiencing a period of growth and transformation and your active involvement in this meeting will contribute significantly to our collective success. This is a time for collaboration and innovation and we look forward to hearing your perspectives. Let us work together to create a roadmap that is both realistic and ambitious.  

Thank you for your continued dedication and support. We are excited about the opportunities that lie ahead and we believe that this meeting will be a pivotal moment in our journey. Please mark your calendars and join us for what promises to be a productive and engaging session.  

Best regards
